Well it's been funny few days. Saturday made the best beefburgers yet the recipe's from fellow member, Oddley.
I've always been "don't use anything other than chuck steak, ground with salt and pepper" man, but he's converted me. The spices aren't discernable the taste, but wouldn't good without them.
Things were going well, that until the element went the fan oven Sunday. £50 later and it's and running again.
However, things are looking again. Maurice rang yesterday lunch-time say that the fishmonger had replaced the roe that wasn't very good, free charge. yesterday evening dry salted them for hours, and they're the cold smoker speak.
They certainly look more promising than the last lot.

comes again her grandson's christening day. lost moment, blank spot, one that Carole does not know how measure. She there one second, then she not. She knows exactly where she is, then she does not. Her older church friends tell similar stories about their surgeries, how they count backward from ten with oxygen mask over their faces, then wake before reaching one, only find that hours, and sometimes even days, have gone by. She feels though she were experiencing the same thing.
